title: Kent&Stowe 70100800 Jute Twine Green 80m (100g)
features: Multi-use: This twine string from Kent & Stowe is essential for a wide array of general gardening jobs such as tying garden structures and plant supports.
Strong and durable: This green garden twine is soft enough not to damage delicate young seedlings and is great for tying plants such as tomatoes.
100% biodegradable: Strong enough to not easily degrade from exposure to outdoor elements, this versatile jute twine will break down naturally over time to avoid garden pollution.
80m length: This twine gardening string measures 80m ensuring there is more than enough length to create multiple plant ties and other twine arrangements.
Scope of delivery: Kent & Stowe Jute Twine 80m/100g, colour: green, material: 3 ply jute, product code: 70100800
description: From the manufacturer Kent & Stowe Jute Twine in Green Kent & Stowe Anvil Eversharp Secateurs Kent & Stowe 9L Watering Can Kent & Stowe 4.5L Watering Can Kent & Stowe Capability Trowel Kent & Stowe Stainless Steel Digging Spade Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.4 out of 5 stars 48 3.5 out of 5 stars 12 3.4 out of 5 stars 309 4.3 out of 5 stars 215 4.8 out of 5 stars 380 4.4 out of 5 stars 68 Price £5.43 £ 5 . 43 £26.75 £ 26 . 75 £34.40 £ 34 . 40 £25.59 £ 25 . 59 £14.95 £ 14 . 95 £33.30 £ 33 . 30 Category Garden twine Cutting hand tool Outdoor watering can Outdoor watering can Digging hand tool Digging spade Description 80m of strong, durable twine essential for a wide array of general gardening jobs such as tying garden structures and plant supports. Anvil secateurs with Eversharp carbon steel blades, ideal for cutting delicate stems and the general pruning of dead wood. This classic Kent & Stowe 9L Metal Watering Can in galvanised steel is ideal for the everyday watering and feeding of the whole garden with its greater capacity. This classic Kent & Stowe 4.5L Metal Watering Can in deep violet is ideal for the everyday watering and feeding of plants. Built with multi-functionality at its core, the Capability Trowel is a garden essential thanks to the serrated edge for slicing through weeds, pointed tip for stony soils and a hammer handle for hammering in stakes. A timeless classic with a crafted ash wood spade handle. Perfect for digging up and breaking soil around the garden.
